system.description:
The preserver is a wizard of the old, established school of magic. In the give and take of spell casting, preservers have mastered the balance. A preserver's magical spells are cast in harmony with nature.

Spell Book: Magic-users carry spell books containing the formulae for arcane spells. A 1st level magic-user has one spell in their spell book, selected by the referee

Spell Memorization: The number of spells they may memorize is determined by the character's experience level

Preserving Magic: Preservers have the option to defile when casting spells, but they are only encouraged to defile if doing so is the only option for survival

Magical Research: A magic-user of any level may spend time and money on magical research to add new spells to their spell book

Magic Item Creation: When a magic-user reaches 9th level, they are able to create magic items

Preserver Cryptolect: Preservers know a hidden language of non-verbal signs, queues and symbols used to communicate secretly and cast spells unnoticed with a 60% chance of success

Apprentices: The preserver may recruit 1d6 apprentices of levels 1-3 to train as preservers, eventually setting up a veiled alliance
